title: P0: Hardcoded conference bounds instead of conference_area var in roaming validation
description: Validation uses magic numbers 0<=x<=150 0<=y<=100 but conference_area=(0.0,150.0,0.0,100.0) defined earlier; risks desync if area changes. Use conference_area tuple for bounds check. Discovered in codereview pass 1 on test_scale.py edit. Fix before closing szub.
close_reason: All fixes applied to test_scale.py: non-overlapping roam indices (100-140), conference_area bounds used, rx_count==0 validation for far nodes + unique_peers check. Addresses P0/P2/P3.
